violations.description: General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. -Cardboard liner used in utensil bin at clean storage. *COS-removed and disposed of cardboard.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. -Paper towel dispenser near walk in cooler has broken (but functional) handle.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Underside of make table handles and under side of proof box door handles have build up of residue.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Food/debris at hooks used to store pizza rings above make table. -Hanging dust/debris at wire shelf above cut table. -Splatter/debris at wall/surfaces at back of cut table. -Dust/debris at bottom shelves of multiple green wire racks.
Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Dish pit area has some black debris build up at back splash/surfaces.

Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Warewash machine was not maintained and/or operated as required. -Dishwasher is not sanitizing, does not appear to be pulling enough chemical when primed. *Facility has been manually sanitizeng while awaiting repair service. -Ware wash machine has grease/ residue/debris at top surface and interior side edges and bottom surfaces/drain.
Plumbing system. — --Plumbing system was not designed, constructed, operated and/or maintained according to regulation. -Water leak at 3 compartment sink faucet and at bell of ware wash machine.
Toilet facilities. — --Toilet room was not clean or kept in good repair. East restroom: -Residue at light switch. -Residue/soap scum below soap dispenser. -Out of toilet paper.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Dust/debris at ceiling vents, above fryer and behind wing station. -Frost/ice build up at ceiling and floor of walk in freezer.

Refrigerated Storage. — --Refrigerator or cold storage was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining potentially hazardous food at a temperature of 41F or less. -Top right side of prep table found with temperature of 45F to 52F. *Disposed of pepperoni and chicken sausage immediately. Service tech to be called in by owner ASAP.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. -Peeling/flaky wrap at buttons above make table. -Broken cracked container being used to store clean utensils/dishes.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Warmer (for to-go orders) has splatter at interior surfaces. -Grease residue at shelves above and bleow cut table. -Grease build up and trash/receipts at bottom shelves of wing table. -Dust at top of wings refrigerator. -Residue at underside of handles at wing refrigeration prep table handles. -Grease residue at shelf in bottom left side of prep table. -Dust at vents of prep table. -Splatter on day dot dispenser. -Heavy residue at surfaces of paper towels dispensers. -Residue on underside of handles and interior floors of proofer. -Residue at bottom of bottom shelf of stainless table at dish pit. -Grease residue at interior corners of dishwasher.

Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of individual disposable towels, continuous towel supply system, or heated air-drying device. -Paper towels were jammed in dispenser at front hand sink. *Corrected by staff immediately. -Paper towels were out at dish pit hand sink.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc. …) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Dust build up at lights, ceiling vents, and at cords/wall behind prep table. -Ice build up at interior ceiling and floor of walk in freezer.
Clean, maintained, tissue, vented, self-closing door (1 pt deducted)

Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
